target: 47. Hishigata Clinic Old Ward
July 23
Shinpei Ajiro
(We decided to go home first to prepare and meet at the entrance of Mt. Takanosu)
(I brought the nail gun Nezu left behind…)

(I've practiced a bit since then,
but it's still far from sufficient…
Can I handle it properly in actual combat?)
I kept you waiting!!

How's it? Amazing equipment, right?!
I used to be a catcher in the baseball club until last year!!!
I'm wearing the gear from back then!

And a metal bat! Simple ones are the strongest!
Defense and attack power are both top-notch!!!
…S-So, Sou!!
Huh?

I'm often called an idiot…
But maybe I should make fun of that outfit?
I'm being super serious!!!

You, are you sure you can handle that outfit?!
You're not coming empty-handed, are you?!
No problem!
I'm with you!

Whoa!!
That necklace…
You're wearing Shio, aren't you?!

Ah, that's reassuring.
Let's go to the old ward!

…Sou.
Why were you trying to explore the old ward in the first place?
Huh? Ah…
I once sneaked in during the summer vacation of fourth grade…
What!?
I was invited by Totsumura and his friends to do a ghost hunt…

Wow, worst… He's a cop for crying out loud!
Can't he read the "No Trespassing" sign?!
Who are you to say that?!

But I never actually got in.
I got caught by my dad…
(That kind of thing…)

I didn't really think about it back then…
It's our family's land after all,
and my dad was there.

But thinking about it, it's strange.
What was my dad doing alone in this ruin?

…I see.
So you thought there was something hidden?
If something's hidden in a ruin, what could it be?
Shio, is the Shadow nearby?
Uhhhhhhhh…

(Shio, who regained her memories,
can now sense the Shadow's presence)
(It could be in here too… How about it?)

…Hey!! 
It's safe right now!!!
W-Wait! Sudden human form…!

Hey! Wait a second!
You guys gonna wear swimsuits and mess around?!

You might have to fight a Shadow!
Did you come here to swim?!

Huh? Did you come to play baseball?
Ohhhhh!

The swimsuit is my battle uniform!
Don't underestimate me!!!
Yikes!!!

Scary…!! She's scary!!
Totally different from Mio!
What kind of place do you live in, Shinpei?!

Shut up!!!
Shinpei, explain already!

Ah, right.
After trying a bunch of things…

I realized that wearing real clothes or items
would get in the way when transforming.

Even if I wear armor, my real body is a flat shadow…
A shadow can't survive being pierced.

So if I'm fighting in my repertoire,
the swimsuit is the best option!
I can transform any copy endlessly—more copies mean broader repertoires within memory limits.
Cool, right?!

Ah… 
But I don't know where to look now!!!
Hey!
Huh?

Huh… 
The atmosphere is way too intense…
It might start collapsing…

It's forbidden to enter because the building
became dilapidated 14 years ago.
It's not impossible.
Wait!?

It's okay to walk around inside,
but don't make too much noise.

(There are a lot of old furniture and books…
It's hard to tell how old they are)

Incredible… It's still preserved like this.
It has historical value.
Ah…

They say it wasn't burned during the Wakayama air raid,
so it's been standing since the Meiji era, over 100 years old.
I heard it became a ruin around 1960.
Hm…
(…Something… Something that shows a connection to the Shadow…)

…What?
There's a big hole in the ceiling.

The stairs leading up are collapsed.
That means going to the second floor is impossible…

Wait!
Can't you go up with the Shadow's power, Shio?

Huh?
That…

Oh! I remember! 
You're scared of ghosts, right?!
I'll go check it out!
Gh… I told you not to say that…
I'll do it! I'll check it out!
There you go!!!
Wow!! It's going through the wall!!!
I'll check it out, stay here Shinpei!!!

I'm not doing this because I'm scared!!
If I get separated, I can't help you if something happens!!!
Understood.

There's no ghost, but there is a Shadow!
Be careful!!!
I know, you idiot!!!
Wow, scary!!!

(Well, I'll check the first floor.
Where should I start…)

(There's a medicine cabinet in front of me.
The floor is covered in scattered papers)
Check the medicine cabinet
Check the scattered papers
Ask Shio about the second floor

(I'll check the medicine cabinet.
…There might be dangerous things.
I need to be careful when touching them)

There are so many unfamiliar medicines…
Seems like they're all old.
The text is in old characters, and the printing is faded…
Let me see…

Ergot extract…
This one is benzoic acid… used for preservation and sterilization.
There's also isomine.

Hey!
This is… mercury!
Mercury?

<color=#GF_KEY_SHOUKOU>Mercury chloride</color>… a poisonous drug that's no longer used!
This is dangerous!
Why did we leave this lying around?!
(What is this paper?)
This is…!!!

(I think these are old medical records… prescriptions?
Why are they scattered like this on the floor?!!)

(The patient's birth dates
include Showa, Taisho, even Meiji!!
Clearly pre-war documents!)

(Gastritis, bronchitis, pneumonia…
All common diseases.)

(Hishigata-sensei called the Shadow Sickness
"Capgras syndrome," but I don't see that term
in any of these records.)

(Also… mixed in with the discarded documents…
What is this?)

(<color=#GF_TIPS_109>Panda plush</color>?
It's pretty dirty, but this must be a recent one…)

Shio!
How's it going over there?

Hey, don't suddenly talk to me!
Say something before you talk!
That's crazy…

Something… it seems like someone lived here!
I found an album, I'll throw it over.
Okay.

…What? This is…
<color=#GF_TIPS_104>My album</color> isn't it?!
Don't just toss it around carelessly!
(Where else might have something?)
S-Stop, Shinpei!!!
What's wrong!?
W-What is that…?
It seems like an operating room…

A wooden carving…?
It's creepy…
Seems really old.

An operating room with a statue…
You don't usually put statues in such places.

It's holding a fish in its left side.
Tuna…?

Hmm, I've seen this before.
What was it… Oh! For business success!
Bissho-sama! (Bishamonten)!
That's it!!
I'll do a quick search.

Ebisu…?
One of the Seven Lucky Gods, the god of fishing…?

…Ah.
This…!
What's wrong?

Look.
There's a website that details the god Ebisu…

There are multiple deities named Ebisu,
and they're sometimes considered the same as the deity Hachiman.
Could it be… Hiruko-sama…?

Hiruko-sama?!
Is this…?!

What's going on…?
Why is something like this here…?!
I don't know… just a guess.
(But… if this is really Hiruko-sama…)

First of all, what does Hiruko-sama look like?
I've never seen them… I don't even know if they're male or female.

There's no detailed description anywhere…
They have the appearance of a serpent without limbs… 'Monstrous' is the only way to describe it…

I don't get it… why would such a deity
be worshipped as a lucky god?!
(…Wind through the cracks…?)
Hey, Ushio!
What's wrong?!

Wait, wow!
What is this?!
Creepy…!!!
What about the second floor?

There were a lot of things there…
If we're going to check properly, one day won't be enough.

So?
Did anything happen?

Look, there's a one-centimeter gap in this wall.
You could fit through as a shadow, right?

You're a real troublemaker with your shadow tricks…
I'll treat you to takoyaki for the festival tomorrow!

…Okay.
I'll buy ten or even a hundred of them.

Seriously?!
You said it, Shinpei! It's a promise!!

…What's going on?!
Something's happening!

Something's… what's going on with the floor?
It's too dark to see anything!

What if it lit up with a flash?!
You can do it now, right?
No need to copy anything else!
Oh! Right!

Wait!
This wall… maybe it's a door?!
There's a keyhole!!
What?!

But I don't know where the key is.
It doesn't seem to be around here…

Then it's my turn!
I'll smash the door with a bat!

Okay!
Ushio, get back for a moment!
Got it!
Then, Sou, try breaking it with the bat.
Here I go… YAH!!!

Grrrr…!!!
My arm… it's numb…!!!

No good… it's way too strong…
It's impossible to break open…
We'll have to find the key…

Damn it!! 
It's definitely suspicious…
What can I do?!
This is so frustrating!!!

…There must still be things to do.
There are other suspicious places,
let's check them out.

For now,
that statue seems really suspicious!

But… 
From what I can see, it's just
resembling Ebisu-sama…

But Ebisu-sama is usually a fat old man…
This… it's kind of feminine…
(Feminine…?)
I said it might be Hiruko-sama…

Wait!?
This creepy thing is that?!

It's just Shinpei's guess for now.
Hey Shinpei?
Shinpei, what's wrong?

No, earlier you said…
You said it was feminine, right?

That made me curious,
this Hiruko-sama statue… its belly
is swollen, isn't it?

Could it be…?
Is it pregnant…?

You're right… it is…
But did Hiruko-sama grant blessings for children?

No… I don't think so.
Then what is this…?

Wait…
I'll check inside the statue.

Check?
How are you going to check…?

(…!!
The flash when copying…!)

The shadow scan can see through objects!
It can see human skeletons and internal organs… that's why it can copy them!

…It's true!
There's something inside the belly!!
Seriously?!
I'll copy it to check!

Hair?
What am I supposed to do with that?
That's how!
Oh, right, using hair to copy…

This… this is…!!
The key…!!!
Ushio, I'm counting on you!
Got it!

!!
The door…!
It's open!

Inside the room… there's a hole?
It must lead underground…

Be careful, both of you…
I can feel the presence of a shadow from down there…

The shadow scans the abdomen of the statue…
Then, the shadow that entered through the gap in the wall
uses the copied key to open the inside…

Without me…
It's impossible to open this hidden door
with the shadow's power…
There's something like that in my house…!!!
Dad…!!!
…Ushio.

It's not scary.
As long as I'm with Shinpei.
Let's go.
